text:
Yantras
Those kept under the hat or turban or in a pocket.
Dharshan Yantras
These are those the Sadhaka contemplates in the morning for
his spiritual welfare or those installed in the temples for the
welfare of all.
14
Aghori.it

Magical and Practical uses of Yantras:
Shantikaran Yantras
Used to pacify the evil spirits or influences of the planets, to
cure diseases.
Stambhan Yantras
Stambhan means pillar but means also stiff, stop, still. These
Yantras are used to stop an event, to paralyze an enemy or
prevent an attack.
Vashikaran Yantras
Used to control someone or something. For example, an
enemy, a lover, but also a spirit or deity.
Videshan Yantras
Used to divide and create disputes between people.
Uchatan Yantras
Used to distract and retain an enemy away from home.
Maran Yantras
Used to inflict death to an enemy.
N.B. These same categories are also applicable to Mantras and
Tantras.
15
Aghori.it
